title: Fix login issue — user cannot log in to the app

requirements.text: Audit and fix the Internet Identity login flow in ChatView and useInternetIdentity so that a user can successfully initiate and complete login. The login button must be visible and interactive, the AuthClient must open the Internet Identity popup without errors, and after authentication the app must transition from the unauthenticated state to the authenticated/profile-setup state without hanging or throwing errors.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly visible login button is rendered when the user is not authenticated.
Clicking the login button opens the Internet Identity authentication popup without throwing any console errors.
After successful authentication, the app transitions out of the unauthenticated state and renders either the DisplayNamePrompt/ProfileSetupModal (new users) or the main ChatView UI (returning users).
If the login popup is cancelled or fails, the app returns to the login screen gracefully without crashing.
No unhandled promise rejections or console errors occur during the full login lifecycle.

requirements.text: Audit the useActor hook initialisation sequence to ensure that once a user is authenticated via Internet Identity, the backend actor is created with the correct authenticated identity and is non-null before any backend calls are made. If the actor fails to initialise after login, add a retry mechanism and surface a user-facing error message rather than silently hanging.
acceptanceCriteria: After a successful Internet Identity login, the useActor hook produces a non-null actor reference within a reasonable time (e.g., 5 seconds).
If actor initialisation fails, an inline error message is displayed and the user is not left on a blank or spinning screen.
Authenticated actor calls (e.g., getUserProfile) succeed after login without 'actor is not available' errors.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts directly — propose changes via wrapper components or safe alternatives if those files are immutable.
Do not alter the backend Motoko actor's public API.
nonGoals: Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.
Changes to the video call, friends panel, or message feed features unless directly related to the login fix.
